stableFeatures.title: Split editor workflow
stableFeatures.detail: Monaco editing, React Flow graph visualization, node navigation, and source-to-graph refresh are implemented.
stableFeatures.evidence: M1/M2 complete; default app E2E currently passes 39/39.

stableFeatures.title: Parser, validator, diagnostics
stableFeatures.detail: The parser, E001-E008 errors, W001-W006 warnings, I001-I003 suggestions, markers, ProblemPanel, and graph status sync are implemented.
stableFeatures.evidence: pnpm.cmd test passes 41 files / 1231 tests; Parser/Validator E2E record is green.

stableFeatures.title: Condition editor and text sync
stableFeatures.zhTitle: 鏉′欢缂栬緫鍣ㄤ笌鏂囨湰鍚屾
stableFeatures.detail: The visual condition editor can load existing conditions and apply variable/operator/value logic back to text.
stableFeatures.evidence: M3 complete; condition-editor E2E is part of the default app E2E gate.

stableFeatures.title: JSON / HTML / TXT export
stableFeatures.detail: The export flow is implemented and current export E2E passes; PNG placeholder menu has been removed from release scope.
stableFeatures.evidence: M4 25/26; export suite passed in the latest release audit notes.

stableFeatures.title: Windows local package smoke
stableFeatures.detail: The Windows NSIS installer and win-unpacked app were built locally and smoke-tested for launch, command-line open, save, and JSON export.
stableFeatures.evidence: M7-02 and M7-14 complete in spec/progress.md.

stableFeatures.title: Graph Lab graph-first workflow
stableFeatures.zhTitle: Graph Lab 鍥句紭鍏堝伐浣滄祦
stableFeatures.detail: Graph Lab is now a core entry with workspace mode switching, Palette, Inspector, Source Drawer, text command layer, and E2E coverage.
stableFeatures.evidence: M8 Graph Lab Core is 17/18; default app E2E currently passes 39/39.

experimentalFeatures.title: macOS / Linux packaging
experimentalFeatures.detail: Cross-platform installers and smoke tests are deferred until CI matrix packaging is available.
experimentalFeatures.evidence: M7-03, M7-04, and M7-15 are deferred.

experimentalFeatures.title: Auto-update and public release pipeline
experimentalFeatures.zhTitle: 鑷姩鏇存柊涓庡叕寮€鍙戝竷閾捐矾
experimentalFeatures.detail: electron-updater integration, update server config, GitHub Release draft, and first-run onboarding are deferred.
experimentalFeatures.evidence: M7-09, M7-10, M7-12, and M7-13 are deferred.

experimentalFeatures.title: Graph Lab release copy and onboarding
experimentalFeatures.detail: The core Graph Lab workflow is implemented; public release copy, help text, and first-run guidance still need final polish.

roadmap.title: Graph Lab release documentation
roadmap.zhTitle: Graph Lab 鍙戝竷璇存槑鏀跺熬
roadmap.detail: Finish Graph Lab public copy, help text, first-run guidance, and website download notes.

roadmap.title: Complete M7 publishing chain
roadmap.zhTitle: 琛ラ綈涓冨彿鍙戝竷閾捐矾
roadmap.detail: Add macOS/Linux packaging, auto-update, GitHub Release draft, first-run onboarding, and cross-platform smoke verification.

roadmap.title: Extend Graph Lab visual editors
roadmap.detail: Upgrade inline condition/effect fields into richer visual builders while keeping the same graphEditService command layer.

roadmap.title: Deploy this independent website
roadmap.detail: Build website/dist separately and deploy it to a server. Keep it excluded from desktop application packaging.
